Description: Average Temperature
Total Precipitation
Mean diurnal temperature range
Simple Daily Intensity Index (SDII) or average precipitation for days with daily precipitation over 1 mm.
The number of dry periods of 5 day or more, during which the total precipitation on a window of 3 day(s) is below 1 mm
Maximum consecutive number of days in a dry period, during which the total daily precipitation is under 1 mm.
The total length of dry spell events occurring within a given period. A dry spell occurs when daily total preciputation is under 1 mm, over at least 3 days.
The number of wet periods of 5 day or more, during which the total precipitation on a window of 3 day(s) is above 1 mm
Maximum consecutive number of days in a wet period, during which the total daily precipitation is over 1 mm.
The total length of wet spell events occurring within a given period. A wet spell occurs when daily total preciputation is over 1 mm, over at least 3 days.
The number of heat wave events within a given period. A heat wave occurs when daily minimum and maximum temperatures exceed 22 °C and 30 °C, respectively, over at least 3 days.
The maximum length of heat wave events occurring within a given period. A heat wave occurs when daily minimum and maximum temperatures exceed 22 °C and 30 °C, respectively, over at least 3 days.
The total length of heat wave events occurring within a given period. A heat wave occurs when daily minimum and maximum temperatures exceed 22 °C and 30 °C, respectively, over at least 3 days.
Weighted moving sum of daily precipitation totals with a 7-day window. Weights are an exponential decay of base 0.935.
Cumulative sum of temperature degrees for mean daily temperature above 65 °F
Cumulative sum of temperature degrees for daily temperatures below 65 °F
Cumulative sum of temperature degrees for mean daily temperature above 4 °C
Corn heat units (Tmin > 40 °F and Tmax > 50 °F, with additional attributes
Number of days where maximum daily temperatures are above freezing and minimum daily temperatures are at or below freezing
Number of days with daily precipitation flux above the 95th daily percentile for the 1981-2010 period
Number of days where temperature is below 5th daily percentile and precipitation is below 5th daily percentile for the 1981-2010 period
Number of days where temperature is below 5th daily percentile and precipitation is above 95th daily percentile for the 1981-2010 period
Number of days where temperature is below 95th daily percentile and precipitation is below 5th daily percentile for the 1981-2010 period
Number of days where temperature is below 95th daily percentile and precipitation is above 95th daily percentile for the 1981-2010 period
